Contact Us →

Supporting DOI’s mission with clarity, care, and community focus.

The Accounting Department helps DOI maintain accurate records, protect grant and organizational funds, process payments, and support programs that serve Black children, families, schools, and broader communities.

This site is designed to reduce confusion: staff can find the right form, understand what documentation is required, and contact Accounting from one place.

How the accounting process works

A simple workflow helps staff understand what to do before submitting a request.

1

Prepare

Identify the business purpose, program, department, budget line, and needed approval.

2

Submit

Complete the correct form and attach receipts, quotes, invoices, or supporting documents.

3

Review

Accounting reviews completeness, budget coding, allowable cost rules, and internal controls.

4

Process

Approved requests are processed, filed, and tracked for reporting and future reference.

Forms Library

Use this section to access Accounting request forms, download templates, and submit completed files to the Accounting Department.

Excel Template + Upload Portal

PEX Funding Request Form

Use this workflow before making purchases with PEX cards. Staff should first open the Excel template, download or save a copy, complete the requester sections, and then upload the completed file through the submission portal.

Step 1Open template
Step 2Download a copy
Step 3Complete Sections 1–3
Step 4Upload completed file
Requester reminder:
Complete Sections 1–3 on Page 1 only. Sections 4–7 are reserved for Accounting review, approval, coding, and final processing.
Download Excel Template →Submit Completed Request →

Frequently Asked Questions

Clear answers reduce back-and-forth emails and help staff submit complete requests.

When should I submit a PEX Funding Request?

Submit the completed PEX Excel template before making the purchase. Requesters should complete Sections 1–3 on Page 1 only and upload the file through the PEX Submission Portal.

What documents are required for reimbursement?

Please include the reimbursement form, itemized receipts, business purpose, approval, department/program information, and applicable budget or grant coding.

Who should I contact if I am unsure which form to use?

Email Accounting at Accounting Email. Include the expense type, amount, vendor, deadline, and any available supporting documents.

Contact Accounting

For PEX, reimbursements, invoices, vendor payments, budget coding, forms, and procedure questions, please use the single Accounting Department mailbox.

Accounting Email

Monday–Friday · 8:30 AM–5:00 PM
